note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

judgment_creditor.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

judgment_debtor.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

my_name_is.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

weekly.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

biweekly.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

monthly.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

1.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.
